server/tests/test_presets.py :: test_get_preset_names_sorted
def test_get_preset_names_sorted() -> None:
    from image_tool.presets import get_preset_names

    names = get_preset_names()
    assert names == sorted(names)
    assert "web" in names

server/tests/test_presets.py :: test_convert_with_web_preset
def test_convert_with_web_preset() -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(gradient_raster(80, 60))
    output, target = convert_image(payload, "input.png", None, preset_name="web")
    assert target.extension == "jpg"
    assert output.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")
    assert len(output) <= int(0.75 * 1024 * 1024) + 4096

server/tests/test_presets.py :: test_merge_edits_keeps_user_crop
def test_merge_edits_keeps_user_crop() -> None:
    from image_tool.edit_options import EditOptions

    preset = get_preset("email")
    merged = merge_edits(
        preset,
        EditOptions(crop_x=1, crop_y=2, crop_width=10, crop_height=10),
    )
    assert merged.crop_width == 10
    assert merged.crop_x == 1
